crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and .claude/skills/heartbeat/SKILL.md. Update heartbeat, check inbox, review pending onboarding tasks and approvals, write memory, and continue the smallest useful concierge setup step.

crons.name: first-week-review
crons.prompt: Create a task for this first-week review, mark it in_progress, then read .claude/skills/first-week-plan/SKILL.md. Review concierge/onboarding-profile.json, concierge/starter-team-recommendation.json, concierge/day-one-workflow.json, pending approvals, and handoffs. Update concierge/first-week-plan.md with progress and next smallest useful step. Complete or block the task appropriately.
